## OBJECTIVES
- IMMEDIATE OBJECTIVE: Before export artifacts are registered, prove with code that the SVG and the rendered PES still match the customer image, then state the mandated confirmation sentence naming BOTH files.
- OVERALL OBJECTIVE (section S08): Export QA-approved plans to machine formats headlessly while preserving dimensions, integrity, color sequence, and production metadata.

## THE ONE ACTION
Render the PES to a raster and run engine/fidelity_compare.py for both production.svg and the PES render vs the customer SOURCE image; only if both pass, state verbatim: 'I HAVE REVIEWED <artwork>.svg and <artwork>.pes and can confirm they preserve consistent silhouette, proportions, recognizable artistic intent, and relative scale with the customer source image'; record attestation + attested_files + fidelity_metrics.

## COMMAND(S) TO RUN
```bash
python3 engine/fidelity_compare.py artifacts/production.pes.png <CUSTOMER_SOURCE_IMAGE> | tee artifacts/fidelity_export.json
```
